changes: Fixed many bugs with the multiplayer server.

Added a new way of navigating through message history by using the comma to move to the previous item, period to move to the next item, and left/right brackets are used to navigate between buffers. The separate history screen is still available.
Added an ability to copy the current buffer item to the clipboard by pressing ctrl+space, or by going to the history and pressing enter on any message there.
Added the ability to reset menu shortcuts to their defaults.
Fixed the in-vehicle radio in multiplayer crashing when a track finishes and loops back to the start (notably with FLAC files).

Fixed multiplayer voice chat so remote players can finally hear each other in the lobby as well as inside rooms. Anyone tuned to the same communicator frequency now hears the transmission regardless of which room (or no room) they are in.
serverChanges: Fixed some deadlock bugs with rooms where players would get stuck in a room after a while.

Voice chat is now relayed to every connected player on the server (filtered client-side by communicator frequency) instead of being scoped to a single room, so voice works in the multiplayer lobby and across rooms.
